ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or territory */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state or territory */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state or territory (e.g., CA, TX) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state or territory */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the United States (e.g., Northeast, South) */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Current population of the state (latest available) */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "state_population_density" REAL /* Population density (population per square mile) */,
  "state_founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the state was admitted to the Union */,
  "state_flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the state flag image */,
  "state_seal_url" TEXT /* URL to the state seal image */,
  "state_website_url" TEXT /* URL to the official state website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population estimate */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state or territory */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the population estimate is given */,
  "population_estimate" INTEGER /* Population estimate for the state or territory */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the population estimate (e.g., Census Bureau, state agency) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to estimate the population */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_data" (
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census data point */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state or territory */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the census data is given */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state or territory according to census data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the census data (e.g., decennial census, American Community Survey) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_growth" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population growth calculation */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state or territory */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year for the population growth calculation */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Ending year for the population growth calculation */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate for the given time period */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in population for the given time period */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the growth rate */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the growth rate */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_growth_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_info" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic data point */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state or territory */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the state or territory */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the state or territory */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state or territory */,
  "boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates for the state boundary (e.g., GeoJSON format) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone(s) for the state */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the state */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_info_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role to which the permission applies */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Specific permission granted to the role (e.g., view_population, edit_population) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population projection */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state or territory */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the population is projected */,
  "projected_population" INTEGER /* Projected population for the state or territory */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the population projection (e.g., state agency, research institute) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to project the population */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the projection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_projections_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data point */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state or territory */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the demographic data (e.g., 0-18, 19-64, 65+) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population for the given age range */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the demographic data is given */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity (e.g., White, Black, Hispanic) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data point */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state or territory */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) for the state or territory */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the state or territory */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the economic data is given */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_statistics" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health statistic */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state or territory */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy for the state or territory */,
  "obesity_rate" REAL /* Obesity rate for the state or territory */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the health data is given */,
  "infant_mortality_rate" REAL /* Infant mortality rate */,
  "life_expectancy_at_birth" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth */,
  "smoking_rate" REAL /* Smoking rate */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the health data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_statistics" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education statistic */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state or territory */,
  "high_school_graduation_rate" REAL /* High school graduation rate for the state or territory */,
  "bachelor_degree_rate" REAL /* Bachelor's degree attainment rate for the state or territory */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the education data is given */,
  "high_school_dropout_rate" REAL /* High school dropout rate */,
  "graduate_degree_rate" REAL /* Rate of graduate degree attainment */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the education data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
